The '''Secossi system''' was located within the [[Spirva sector/Legends|Spirva sector]]. Its [[Star/Legends|sun]] was [[Secossi]], and the [[Star system/Legends|system]] contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lenthalis]].

{{System-stub}}
